input persona: A data analyst for sports statistics, tracking performance trends and player rankings in darts and other similar games.
synthesized text:
As a data analyst for sports statistics, I need help creating a comprehensive dashboard to track performance trends and player rankings in darts and other similar games. The dashboard should include the following features: 

1. Player profiles: display individual player statistics, including their average score, highest checkout, and win-loss record.

2. Tournament tracking: allow users to select specific tournaments and view real-time updates on player standings and match results.

3. Head-to-head comparisons: enable users to compare the performance of two players against each other, including their past match history and statistics.

4. Ranking systems: develop a ranking system that takes into account player performance across multiple tournaments and adjusts accordingly.

5. Data visualization: incorporate interactive charts and graphs to display player and tournament data, making it easy to identify trends and patterns.

6. Filter and sorting options: provide users with the ability to filter and sort data by various criteria, such as tournament type, player nationality, and date range.

7. Alerts and notifications: set up a system to notify users of significant events, such as a player achieving a new personal best or a major upset in a tournament.

Can you help me design and implement this dashboard, and provide guidance on the best tools and technologies to use for this project?
label: instruction
